resources.title: What is Career Readiness?
resources.publisher: National Association of Colleges and Employers
resources.use_for: Map student evidence and internship behaviors to a shared career-readiness vocabulary.
resources.evidence_boundary: The competencies are a framework, not proof that a particular student or post demonstrates mastery.

resources.title: Career Readiness Resources
resources.publisher: National Association of Colleges and Employers
resources.use_for: Locate assessment and reflection materials that turn broad competencies into observable behaviors.
resources.evidence_boundary: Third-party contributed materials require their own attribution and review before reuse.

resources.title: O*NET OnLine
resources.publisher: U.S. Department of Labor / National Center for O*NET Development
resources.use_for: Ground role, task, skill, technology, and related-occupation language in occupational data.
resources.evidence_boundary: Occupation-level descriptors do not establish the requirements of a specific opening.

resources.title: How to find a job
resources.use_for: Connect job-search content to occupational outlook, wage, location, and preparation data.
resources.evidence_boundary: Labor-market aggregates do not predict an individual's outcome or verify a live vacancy.

resources.title: Job Search
resources.use_for: Ground job-search planning, networking, applications, interviews, salary, and local-help actions.
resources.evidence_boundary: General process guidance does not verify a specific employer, claim, or opportunity.

resources.title: Resume Guide: Formatting
resources.use_for: Ground readable resume structure, ATS-safe layout, and anti-gimmick guidance.
resources.evidence_boundary: Formatting guidance does not establish that any single ATS will parse or rank a resume in a particular way.

resources.title: Career Seekers
resources.use_for: Route students to paid work-based learning, mentors, progressive wages, and portable credentials.
resources.evidence_boundary: Availability, registration status, pay, and eligibility must be checked on each current listing.

resources.title: Students
resources.use_for: Ground federal Pathways and other student opportunity discovery in the official hiring surface.
resources.evidence_boundary: Program descriptions do not mean a suitable vacancy is currently open; verify each announcement.

resources.title: Recent graduates
resources.use_for: Route recent graduates to official Pathways and agency-specific public-service programs.
resources.evidence_boundary: Eligibility windows and current vacancies must be verified in the live announcement.

resources.title: NSF REU: Information for Students
resources.use_for: Ground undergraduate research opportunity discovery, stipend context, and direct-site application routing.
resources.evidence_boundary: Students apply to individual sites; eligibility, support, and deadlines vary and must be rechecked.

resources.title: Science Undergraduate Laboratory Internships
resources.publisher: U.S. Department of Energy Office of Science
resources.use_for: Ground paid national-laboratory internship discovery and the actual application steps.
resources.evidence_boundary: Term dates, eligibility, laboratory participation, and application requirements are time-sensitive.

resources.title: NASA Internship Programs
resources.use_for: Distinguish short-term OSTEM projects from Pathways employment and route to official application details.
resources.evidence_boundary: Deadlines, eligibility, program structure, and openings change by term and must be rechecked.

resources.title: Summer Internship Program
resources.publisher: National Institutes of Health Office of Intramural Training and Education
resources.use_for: Ground research-internship eligibility, materials, mentor outreach, and selection-process content.
resources.evidence_boundary: Program dates, eligibility, compensation, and individual investigator availability must be rechecked.

resources.title: Job Scams
resources.use_for: Ground recruiter, fee, fake-check, personal-information, and reporting red flags.
resources.evidence_boundary: A red flag supports caution and verification; it does not by itself prove fraud.

resources.title: Fact Sheet #71: Internship Programs Under the Fair Labor Standards Act
resources.publisher: U.S. Department of Labor Wage and Hour Division
resources.use_for: Route unpaid-internship questions to the federal primary-beneficiary framework.
resources.evidence_boundary: The fact sheet is general information; legal status depends on facts, jurisdiction, and current law.

resources.title: Chapter 5 - Practical Training
resources.use_for: Route CPT, OPT, and STEM OPT questions to current USCIS guidance and a student's DSO.
resources.evidence_boundary: This catalog cannot provide legal advice or determine an individual's authorization or eligibility.

resources.title: Job Applicants and the ADA
resources.use_for: Ground applicant accommodation and disability-disclosure boundaries in official guidance.
resources.evidence_boundary: General federal guidance is not legal advice and may not resolve state-law or case-specific questions.

resources.title: American Job Centers
resources.publisher: U.S. Department of Labor Employment and Training Administration
resources.use_for: Route students and recent graduates to local staff-assisted search, referral, placement, and specialized support.
resources.evidence_boundary: Services and eligibility vary locally; the center must confirm current availability.
